title: PM Render-Authenticated Mutation-Seam Redeploy And Live-Data Proof Gate
objective: Use a Render-authenticated surface to inspect and, if needed, repair only the existing mutation-seam deployment metadata for service apex-platform-mutation-seam, redeploy current clean-main from apps/mutation-seam, and rerun read-only hosted PM live-data proof without adding product code, schema, auth, ingress, or mutation scope.
current_evidence: Local clean-main head is 18b16fe0e2fd4a7dbaa57652c177d4327b51b1b5 after PM Lane 011 closeout.
operations.apexpowerops.com serves Vercel production deployment dpl_CP53VXXgr98ArXJ34QSvUyh4E6N3 and hosted route smoke passed failed=0 passed=8.
Both hosted seam hosts still omit /api/v1/reads/pm-workfront from OpenAPI, return pm-workfront 404, and return schedule projects/drivers 500.
The repo-owned deployed seam smoke against https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com ends RESULT FAIL on schedule route 500s.
Local environment does not expose RENDER_API_KEY, RENDER_TOKEN, RENDER_SERVICE_ID, RENDER_OWNER_ID, or RENDER_WORKSPACE_ID.
orchestration_inputs: Render deployability scout 019e2c7b-6d25-7023-94d8-dfd06a2ea9ac confirmed root render.yaml is absent, app-local apps/mutation-seam/render.yaml is authoritative, and no repo-owned Render CLI/API redeploy command exists.

PM product backlog scout 019e2c7b-9398-7782-b73a-c65492d612c5 confirmed hosted mutation-seam parity is the blocker before further hosted PM product proof, and queued product follow-ons behind this gate.
required_executor_capability: Authenticated Render dashboard, API, or equivalent control surface with access to existing service apex-platform-mutation-seam.
Ability to trigger a redeploy of the existing service from GitHub clean-main.
Ability to inspect deployment commit, branch, working directory, build command, start command, health path, non-secret env key presence, and runtime logs without disclosing secret values.
allowed_runtime_actions: Confirm service repo is jasonlswenson-sys/apex-power-ops, branch is clean-main, working directory is apps/mutation-seam, and deployed commit is 18b16fe0e2fd4a7dbaa57652c177d4327b51b1b5 or later.

Repair only existing deployment metadata needed to match apps/mutation-seam/render.yaml: working directory apps/mutation-seam, build command pip install -r requirements.txt, start command uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT, health path /health, and autoDeploy true.

Confirm non-secret hosted env posture: SEAM_STORE_BACKEND=postgres and key presence for SEAM_DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, CORS_ORIGINS, APP_ENV, LOG_LEVEL, and PYTHON_VERSION, without printing secret values.
Trigger a redeploy of the existing service from current clean-main.
Inspect Render logs only far enough to classify remaining schedule 500s as DSN, schema, permission, runtime import, or other bounded deployment failure.
Run read-only public probes, deployed seam smoke, and PM live-data smoke after redeploy.
not_allowed: No SQL write or schema migration.
No live database seed, fixture replay, or business-state mutation.
No Vercel production promotion unless a later packet explicitly authorizes it.
No autonomous AI PM assignment, schedule, issue, or apparatus state mutation.
Do not print or commit secret values.
stop_conditions: Stop if Render auth is unavailable.
Stop if repair would require creating a new service, changing DNS, changing auth, widening CORS beyond the existing operations and mutation-seam hosts, or changing public ingress.
Stop if schedule 500s require SQL writes, schema migration, secret rotation, or live fixture replay.
Stop if the service is already on current clean-main and logs indicate a product-code bug; author a follow-up code packet instead.
Stop if hosted proof would require a live mutation test.
constrained_outputs: Render service inspection summary with commit, branch, working directory, and deployment metadata verdict.
Redeploy evidence or truthful Render-auth blockage.
Deployed seam smoke result against https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com.
Read-only PM live-data smoke result against https://operations.apexpowerops.com and https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com.
If still blocked, a log-backed blocker classification without secret disclosure.
No code, SQL, schema, auth, ingress, service-admission, Vercel promotion, live mutation, Operations Visibility, or autonomous AI business-state widening.
validation_steps: Render service inspection for apex-platform-mutation-seam: repo, branch, working directory, deploy commit, build command, start command, health path, autoDeploy, and env key posture
Trigger existing-service redeploy from clean-main if the service is stale or metadata repair is needed

corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web exec node scripts/smoke-pm-live-data.mjs --operations-web-base-url https://operations.apexpowerops.com --mutation-seam-base-url https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com --timeout-ms 20000

With SEAM_STORE_BACKEND=memory, C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/apps/mutation-seam/tests/test_pm_workfront_read_model.py C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/apps/mutation-seam/tests/test_schedule_bridge.py -q
handoff_target: Render-authenticated Codex or Claude Code executor
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-012 authorizes Render deployment inspection/redeploy and read-only hosted proof only. It does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, fixture replay, live data mutation, secret rotation, auth widening, ingress widening, or new service admission.
